name: SegmentStream
description: AI-native marketing measurement infrastructure with ML attribution, incrementality testing and budget optimization.

seo.title: SegmentStream — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: SegmentStream: AI-native marketing measurement infrastructure with ML attribution, incrementality testing and budget optimization.

when_to_use: ML attribution for iOS SKAdNetwork data interpretation
Budget optimization across channels with incrementality testing
First-party attribution modeling for cookieless marketing

pros: ML-based attribution plus incrementality in one platform
Handles web and app data together
cons: Data engineering effort needed to onboard
Enterprise pricing aimed at larger brands
Less recognized brand than Tier-1 MMPs
review.verdict: Modern ML measurement stack for data-heavy brands, but it assumes a mature data foundation already exists.
review.best_for: Data-mature marketing teams running ML attribution and budget optimization across channels.
review.not_for: Small teams that need plug-and-play MMP functionality with minimal setup.
